air drumming.action_anchor: A person mimics playing drums with hands in the air.
phase_cues: raising arms to start drumming motion
alternating hand taps in rhythmic pattern

arm wrestling.action_anchor: Two people lock hands and push against each other's arms on a table.
phase_cues: hands grip and lock in starting position
arms strain as both push with force
one arm is forced down to the surface

beatboxing.action_anchor: A person creates rhythmic sounds using their mouth, lips, tongue, and voice.
phase_cues: Initial breath control and lip preparation
Core rhythmic pattern execution with vocal sounds
Transition between different beat patterns or effects

biking through snow.action_anchor: A person rides a bicycle on a snowy surface.

blowing glass.action_anchor: A person shapes molten glass by blowing air through a blowpipe.

blowing out candles.action_anchor: A person leans forward and exhales forcefully toward lit candles.
phase_cues: person inhales and positions face near candles
person exhales forcefully causing flames to go out

bowling.action_anchor: A person swings and rolls a heavy ball down a lane toward pins.
phase_cues: Approaching lane with ball in hand
Swinging arm back and releasing ball down lane
Ball hitting pins and pins falling

breakdancing.action_anchor: A person performs acrobatic dance moves on the floor.
phase_cues: starting in standing pose with rhythmic footwork
transitioning to floor with spins and freezes
ending with power moves or pose

bungee jumping.action_anchor: A person leaps from a high platform with an elastic cord attached.

catching or throwing baseball.action_anchor: A person grips a baseball and moves their arm to throw or catches a ball in flight.

cheerleading.action_anchor: A group of people in matching uniforms performs synchronized dance moves and acrobatics while holding pom-poms.
phase_cues: forming a lineup with pom-poms raised
executing a choreographed dance sequence with jumps
ending in a pyramid formation or final pose

cleaning floor.action_anchor: A person pushes a mop across a floor surface.

contact juggling.action_anchor: A performer rolls and manipulates a ball or sphere across their body without throwing it.
phase_cues: ball rests on palm or fingers
ball rolls along arm or shoulder

cooking chicken.action_anchor: A person prepares chicken in a kitchen.

country line dancing.action_anchor: People dance in synchronized lines to country music.
phase_cues: Dancers form parallel lines facing forward.
Group performs synchronized steps and turns together.
Lines maintain formation while moving through patterns.

curling hair.action_anchor: A person uses a curling iron to wrap and shape strands of hair.
phase_cues: sectioning hair with comb or brush
wrapping hair around heated curling iron barrel
releasing curl and setting with hand or clip
confusion_cues: brushing or combing hair without heat

deadlifting.action_anchor: A person lifts a loaded barbell from the floor to hip level.

doing nails.action_anchor: A person applies polish to fingernails with a brush.

dribbling basketball.action_anchor: A person bounces a basketball repeatedly with one hand while moving.

driving tractor.action_anchor: A person sits in the cab operating steering and pedals to move a tractor.

drop kicking.action_anchor: A person drops a ball and kicks it before it hits the ground.
phase_cues: person holds ball and prepares to drop
ball falls as person swings leg

dying hair.action_anchor: A person applies hair dye to their hair.

eating burger.action_anchor: A person brings a burger to their mouth and takes a bite.
phase_cues: holding burger with hands near face

feeding birds.action_anchor: A person scatters seeds or breadcrumbs for birds to eat.

giving or receiving award.action_anchor: A person hands a trophy or certificate to another person on a stage.

hopscotch.action_anchor: A person hops on one foot between numbered squares drawn on the ground.
phase_cues: tossing a stone onto a square
hopping through the grid avoiding that square
retrieving the stone and completing the turn

jetskiing.action_anchor: A person rides a personal watercraft over water.
phase_cues: mounting the jetski from water or dock
making sharp turns or jumping wakes

jumping into pool.action_anchor: A person leaps from a pool edge into the water.
phase_cues: person standing or running at pool edge
person launching into air toward water
person submerging into water with splash

laughing.action_anchor: A person's body shakes with rhythmic, open-mouthed exhalations.
phase_cues: mouth begins to open with a smile
laughter subsides into chuckles or sighs

making snowman.action_anchor: A person rolls snowballs and stacks them to form a figure.
phase_cues: rolling a large snowball for the base
placing a medium snowball on top for the torso
adding a small snowball for the head and decorating with facial features

massaging back.action_anchor: A person uses their hands to apply pressure on another's back.
phase_cues: hands placed on back with light pressure
kneading and circular motions across muscles

mowing lawn.action_anchor: A person pushes a lawn mower across grass to cut it.

opening bottle.action_anchor: A person twists a cap off a bottle.

playing accordion.action_anchor: A person holds and compresses an accordion while pressing keys and buttons.

playing badminton.action_anchor: A person swings a racket to hit a shuttlecock over a net.
phase_cues: player prepares stance with racket raised
player strikes shuttlecock with a swift swing
player follows through and returns to ready position

playing basketball.action_anchor: A person dribbles a basketball toward a hoop.

playing didgeridoo.action_anchor: A person holds a long wooden tube to their mouth and blows into it, producing a deep drone.
phase_cues: holding the didgeridoo with both hands near the mouth
blowing steadily to create a continuous drone
using circular breathing to maintain sound without pause
confusion_cues: playing a wind instrument like a trumpet
blowing into a large pipe or horn

playing ice hockey.action_anchor: A player skates on ice while handling a puck with a hockey stick.

playing keyboard.action_anchor: A person's fingers press keys on a keyboard instrument.
phase_cues: hands approach keyboard with fingers extended
fingers press keys in sequence producing sound
hands lift from keys between phrases

playing ukulele.action_anchor: A person strums a small four-stringed instrument with their fingers.
phase_cues: strumming strings with hand or pick

playing xylophone.action_anchor: A person strikes tuned wooden bars with mallets to produce musical tones.

presenting weather forecast.action_anchor: A person stands in front of a weather map, gesturing toward graphics.
phase_cues: person enters frame near weather map
person gestures and explains forecast graphics
person concludes and turns to camera

punching bag.action_anchor: A person strikes a hanging heavy bag with their fists.

pushing cart.action_anchor: A person moves a wheeled cart forward by applying force.
phase_cues: person approaches cart and grasps handle
person leans forward and pushes cart ahead
cart rolls smoothly as person walks alongside

reading book.action_anchor: A person holds a book open and looks at its pages.
phase_cues: person picks up or opens a book
person gazes at pages while holding book
person turns a page or closes book

riding unicycle.action_anchor: A person balances on a single-wheeled cycle while pedaling forward.
phase_cues: mounting the unicycle from a standstill
dismounting by stepping off or hopping down

shaking head.action_anchor: A person moves their head side to side repeatedly.
phase_cues: head turns slightly to one side
head swings fully to opposite side

sharpening pencil.action_anchor: A person rotates a pencil against a sharpener's blade.

shaving head.action_anchor: A person uses a razor to remove hair from their scalp.
phase_cues: moving razor across head in strokes

shot put.action_anchor: An athlete pushes a heavy metal ball from the shoulder into the air.
phase_cues: athlete holds ball at neck in circle
spins or glides to build momentum

shuffling cards.action_anchor: A person holds a deck of cards and mixes them by interleaving or riffling.

slacklining.action_anchor: A person balances while walking on a narrow, flexible line suspended between two points.

sled dog racing.action_anchor: A team of dogs pulls a sled across snow.

snowboarding.action_anchor: A person rides a snowboard down a snowy mountain slope.
phase_cues: starting from standing position on slope

somersaulting.action_anchor: A person tucks and rolls forward or backward in a complete circular motion.

squat.action_anchor: A person bends their knees and lowers their hips toward the ground.
phase_cues: lowering body by bending knees and hips

surfing crowd.action_anchor: A surfer rides a wave while surrounded by other surfers in the water.

trapezing.action_anchor: A person swings and performs acrobatic moves on a suspended bar.

using computer.action_anchor: A person sits at a desk interacting with a computer screen and keyboard.

washing dishes.action_anchor: A person scrubs plates with soapy water at a sink.

washing hands.action_anchor: A person rubs soapy hands under running water.

water skiing.action_anchor: A person glides on water while being towed by a boat.

waxing legs.action_anchor: A person applies warm wax to their leg and removes it with a cloth strip.
phase_cues: applying warm wax to leg hair

weaving basket.action_anchor: A person interlaces flexible materials to form a container.

blasting sand.action_anchor: A person uses a high-pressure air hose to forcefully blow sand off a surface.
phase_cues: person aims hose at sand-covered area
air blast dislodges sand in a concentrated stream
sand scatters away leaving cleaner surface

busking.action_anchor: A person plays an instrument or sings in a public outdoor space for donations.
phase_cues: setting up instrument and donation container
interacting with audience or collecting donations

cutting watermelon.action_anchor: A person slices through a watermelon with a knife.

dancing ballet.action_anchor: A person performs precise, graceful movements in ballet attire.
phase_cues: standing at barre for warm-up exercises
performing center floor combinations with jumps
executing a final pose or bow

dancing charleston.action_anchor: A person performs energetic leg kicks and arm swings in a 1920s jazz dance style.
phase_cues: Starting with side steps and toe taps.
Kicking legs forward and backward alternately.
Ending with a spin or arm flourish.

dancing macarena.action_anchor: A person performs the Macarena dance with synchronized arm and hip movements.
phase_cues: hands placed on head and hips

diving cliff.action_anchor: A person leaps from a high cliff into water below.

filling eyebrows.action_anchor: A person applies makeup to their eyebrows with a pencil or brush.
phase_cues: person holds eyebrow pencil near brow
person draws short strokes along brow line
person blends and smooths the filled area

folding paper.action_anchor: A person bends a sheet of paper along a crease.
phase_cues: paper is folded along a line
paper is pressed to set the fold

hula hooping.action_anchor: A person rotates a hoop around their waist using hip movements.

hurling (sport).action_anchor: A player swings a hurley to strike a small ball through the air.
phase_cues: player grips hurley and positions near sliotar
hurley swings upward to strike sliotar forcefully
sliotar flies toward goal or across field

ice skating.action_anchor: A person glides on ice wearing skates.

paragliding.action_anchor: A person glides through the air using a parachute-like wing.

playing drums.action_anchor: A person strikes drumheads with drumsticks in rhythmic patterns.
phase_cues: setting up posture and grip on drumsticks
executing basic beat pattern on snare and bass
adding fills and cymbal accents to complete phrase

playing monopoly.action_anchor: A person moves a token on a colorful board with property cards.

playing trumpet.action_anchor: A person holds a trumpet to their mouth and blows into it while pressing valves.

pushing car.action_anchor: A person applies force to move a stationary car forward.
phase_cues: person positions hands on car's rear
person leans and pushes car forward
car rolls slowly as person walks alongside

riding elephant.action_anchor: A person sits atop an elephant's back while it moves.
phase_cues: mounting the elephant from a platform

shearing sheep.action_anchor: A person uses electric clippers to remove wool from a sheep.
phase_cues: sheep is positioned and held steady
clippers are run over the sheep's body

side kick.action_anchor: A person extends their leg sideways to strike a target.
phase_cues: preparing stance with weight on supporting leg
swinging leg sideways with hip rotation
extending leg fully to make contact

stretching arm.action_anchor: A person extends their arm outward to stretch muscles.

tap dancing.action_anchor: A person rhythmically strikes the floor with metal-tapped shoes.
phase_cues: feet positioned with weight on balls
arms extended for balance and style

throwing axe.action_anchor: A person swings an axe forward and releases it toward a target.

unboxing.action_anchor: A person removes a new item from its packaging.
phase_cues: person opens packaging with tools or hands
person lifts item out of packaging
